title: gibasis karwinskyana subsp. palmeri
intro: Gibasis karwinskyana subsp. palmeri, also known as Palmer's gilson, is a perennial plant native to Mexico and parts of Central America, belonging to the family Acanthaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Palmer's gilson include wound healing, reduction of fever, and treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. In herbal medicine, Gibasis karwinskyana subsp. palmeri is often prepared as a decoction or tincture, and its leaves and stems are used in traditional remedies.
